description: Plugin-distributed hooks for sales-engineering. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks when the plugin is installed. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the plugin's install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags 4 mechanically-detectable sales-engineering anti-patterns in .md artifacts — (1) a POC/success-criteria doc with no exit/kill/pass-fail rule, (2) a security 'yes' with no evidence anchor (control/SOC 2/ISO/policy), (3) overpromise absolutes ('no limitations'/'does everything'), (4) a demo script with no pain/business-issue/impact mapping. Set SE_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
